buildCommand: export DIRECT_URL=${DIRECT_URL:-$(echo $DATABASE_URL | sed 's/-pooler//')} && (pnpm --filter @gestionale/db db:deploy || (echo 'Migration failed, waiting for Neon cold start...' && sleep 25 && pnpm --filter @gestionale/db db:deploy)) && pnpm --filter @gestionale/db db:generate && next build
